summary: 10k Science is Dynamoid's immersive 3D science learning platform for web and VR. It helps learners explore real scientific data through interactive environments, AI-guided instruction, spoken responses, formative assessment, and educator-facing dashboard insights. Educators can start a free trial account for the web platform, including the web viewer and Educator Dashboard. The platform includes a growing content library, AI Guides that function as embedded instructional agents, NGSS-aligned learning design by the Lawrence Hall of Science, and creator workflows that help scientists and educators turn real research data into immersive visual experiences.
key_features: immersive 3D science experiences in VR and on the web
real scientific data and research-based visualizations
AI Guides that audibly guide, prompt, listen, and respond to students
spoken student responses and AI-supported formative assessment
Educator Dashboard insights into student progress and understanding
NGSS-aligned learning design by the Lawrence Hall of Science
content library spanning biology, chemistry, health science, environmental science, and engineering topics
creator workflows and bootcamps for researcher-generated visualizations
